special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics
special_mechanics.description: Game centered on vehicular combat and racing mechanics. Open environments with destructible vehicles. Vehicle damage affects gameplay.

special_mechanics.name: Pedestrian Interaction
special_mechanics.description: Running over pedestrians grants time bonuses and points. Affects race completion objectives.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Source material is primarily historical/design documentation from Wikipedia. No technical physics parameters are documented. Game is a vehicular combat racer, not a character platformer, so traditional movement physics (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not applicable or documented.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Carmageddon article (gameplay, development, release information)
